notes: Validation export, label-sheet, merge, frame evaluation, clinical-scale agreement evaluation, threshold calibration, and model-readiness report tooling are implemented.
No clinician-reviewed validation dataset is committed in this repository.

House-Brackmann, Sunnybrook, and eFACE-style estimates remain Mirror estimates until reviewed assessment labels from current v2 estimates with at least 80% usable movement coverage meet the documented 80% observed agreement, 80% Wilson lower-bound agreement, and House-Brackmann case-mix standard.
Primary clinical-scale target assignment should use the blinded label sheet workflow in docs/clinical-scale-review-protocol.md.
Production threshold constants should not be changed from calibration reports until reviewed datasets are available.
